title: Buy 19 September 2021 Exceptional Dividend Dogs Now
text: Last year, May-August 2021, Kiplinger-Today listed eight sets of stocks sorted as: best-buys for 2021, infrastructure-plays, value, growth, small-cap, high-yield, housing-bets, and cash-flow-gushers. Those eight "exceptional-dividend" articles revealed 86-equities, 76-paying-dividends. Kiplinger article-titles were, '21 Best Stocks to Buy'; '14 Best Infrastructure Stocks'; '16 Best Value; '10 Dividends-Growth'; '6 Small-Cap'; '10 High-Yield 4% or More;' '12 Housing; '10 Cash-Flow-Gushers.'

title: This Cheap Basic Materials Stock Pays a Monster Dividend
text: It could be time to be "greedy when others are fearful" when it comes to LyondellBasell.

title: 10 High-Paying Dividend Stocks Yielding 5% or More
text: The dividend yield on the S&P 500 has been hovering near its lowest level in roughly two decades for some time now, and while it's starting to move higher, it's still at a paltry 1.7%. So what are yield-hungry investors left to do?

title: MoneyGram Helps e& Offer Mobile Wallets to 160M People
text: MoneyGram is expanding its partnership with technology and investment group e&, a move the companies say will let nearly 160 million people use the e& mobile wallet to send money around the world in near-real time.

title: My Top 10 Dividend Payers For September
text: Dividends are an important source of income for investors of all types but especially those that rely on their investments in retirement. My ideal dividend payer accomplishes four goals: maximize total return, deliver a meaningful yield, experience strong growth, and provide a margin of safety.

title: LyondellBasell: Management Is A Great Capital Allocator
text: LyondellBasell generates a high free operating cash flow yield of 26% and a cash conversion rate of 91%. The management is shareholder friendly as a large part of this is paid out as dividend and the company buys back shares.

title: 3 Reasons Why LyondellBasell Is A Top High Yield Buy
text: LYB is facing meaningful risks at the moment. However, the fundamentals are too strong to justify the dirt cheap valuation.

title: 5 Top-Notch Dividend Plays in the Diversified Chemical Industry
text: Against the current volatile macroeconomic backdrop, it would be prudent to add some top-quality dividend-paying chemical stocks in your portfolio. CC, CBT, HUN, LYB and TROX fit the bill.
